description: Schema for SENTINEL APEX dist/deployment_manifest.json — the authoritative deployment artifact manifest. Generated by scripts/build_dist_artifact.py, verified by scripts/dist_artifact_verifier.py.
generated_by: CYBERDUDEBIVASH® SENTINEL APEX v155.0 Deployment Governance Rebuild

schema.description: Fixed schema identifier — MUST be this exact string

version.description: Pipeline version (semver) — from PIPELINE_VERSION env var

pipeline_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID — from GITHUB_RUN_ID env var

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when manifest was generated

total_files.description: Total count of files in dist/ (excluding deployment_manifest.json itself)

report_count.description: Count of HTML report files in dist/reports/ (entries starting with 'reports/' and ending '.html')

files.description: Map of relative file path (from dist/) to file metadata

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of file contents

size.description: File size in bytes (MUST be > 0 — zero-byte files indicate corruption)

invariants.report_count_matches_reports: len([k for k in manifest.files if k.startswith('reports/') and k.endswith('.html')]) == manifest.report_count
invariants.no_zero_byte_reports: all(v['size'] > 0 for k,v in manifest.files.items() if k.startswith('reports/'))
invariants.all_sha256_valid: all(re.match(r'^[0-9a-f]{64}$', v['sha256']) for v in manifest.files.values())
invariants.no_internal_dirs: not any(k.startswith(('.github/', 'scripts/', 'data/', 'config/')) for k in manifest.files)

v1.0.0.changes: Initial schema — replaces folder: . rsync deployment

build_dist_artifact.py.behavior: Builds dist/ from working tree and generates this manifest. Hard fails if any report_url path is missing from dist/.

dist_artifact_verifier.py.behavior: Verifies dist/ against this manifest before GitHub Pages deploy. 10-check battery.

report_url_canary.py.behavior: Reads report file paths from this manifest for deterministic URL probing. Primary source (priority 1).
